channel.title: c++14 on @bitwizeshift on software
channel.description: Recent content in c++14 on @bitwizeshift on software

item.title: Creating a Fast and Efficient Delegate Type (Part 1)
item.author: bitwizeshift@rodusek.com (Matthew Rodusek)
item.description: It’s often desirable when working in C++ to create callbacks that never leave a certain lifetime, and only bind functions or function pointers. The C++ standard only offers std::function and std::packaged_task, both of which are more heavy than they need to be. We can do better. Lets produce a better alternative to the existing solutions that could satisfy this problem in a nice and coherent way.
